/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -g  -Wl,-rpath-link,  -Wl,--gc-sections -shared  -o DeadCodeElimination.so CMakeFiles/DeadCodeElimination.dir/DeadCodeElimination.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,"\$ORIGIN/../lib:/usr/lib/llvm-16/lib:" /usr/lib/llvm-16/lib/libLLVM-16.so.1 /usr/lib/llvm-16/lib/libLLVMCore.a /usr/lib/llvm-16/lib/libLLVMSupport.a /usr/lib/llvm-16/lib/libLLVMTransformUtils.a /usr/lib/llvm-16/lib/libLLVMAnalysis.a /usr/lib/llvm-16/lib/libLLVMProfileData.a /usr/lib/llvm-16/lib/libLLVMSymbolize.a /usr/lib/llvm-16/lib/libLLVMDebugInfoPDB.a /usr/lib/llvm-16/lib/libLLVMDebugInfoMSF.a /usr/lib/llvm-16/lib/libLLVMDebugInfoDWARF.a /usr/lib/llvm-16/lib/libLLVMObject.a /usr/lib/llvm-16/lib/libLLVMIRReader.a /usr/lib/llvm-16/lib/libLLVMBitReader.a /usr/lib/llvm-16/lib/libLLVMAsmParser.a /usr/lib/llvm-16/lib/libLLVMCore.a /usr/lib/llvm-16/lib/libLLVMRemarks.a /usr/lib/llvm-16/lib/libLLVMBitstreamReader.a /usr/lib/llvm-16/lib/libLLVMMCParser.a /usr/lib/llvm-16/lib/libLLVMMC.a /usr/lib/llvm-16/lib/libLLVMDebugInfoCodeView.a /usr/lib/llvm-16/lib/libLLVMTextAPI.a /usr/lib/llvm-16/lib/libLLVMBinaryFormat.a /usr/lib/llvm-16/lib/libLLVMTargetParser.a /usr/lib/llvm-16/lib/libLLVMSupport.a -lrt -ldl -lm /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libz.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libzstd.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libtinfo.so /usr/lib/llvm-16/lib/libLLVMDemangle.a
